== Notes for [[Item:Q98391|Q98391]] ==

* [http://mechon-mamre.org/p/pt/pt25a03.htm#21 1 Chronicles 3:21.]

Abarbanel – undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman. Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

See also Dayan Family tree - Mentioned in Dayan Family Tree – “Yashir Moshe”, 1864, Moshe Dayan. http://www.davidicdynasty.org/about.php# (see link to Dayan research).

1 Chr 3:21; Neh 3:29

1 Chr 3:21; Neh 3:29

2 Chr 31:15

1 Chr 24:11

2 Chr 31:15

1 Chr 24:11

Exilarch of Babylon

Exilarch of Babylon

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBCFC00A1EFBBF89829A6488A4DD97B
geni:6000000000961705097

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
